message:
chore(gitignore): ignore bare .beads/recovery/ dir next to .beads/recovery_*/

Beads occasionally materializes recovery state at the plain path
.beads/recovery/ (unsuffixed) in addition to the timestamped
.beads/recovery_<TS>/ dirs the existing pattern already covers. The plain
dir holds transient repair scratch (issues.jsonl snapshot + sync lock +
*.db-wal.bad_* artifacts) and is never authoritative.

Add .beads/recovery/ alongside the existing .beads/recovery_*/ rule so
neither form ends up flagged as untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
